title: Power (Upper): PACE [W6, D1]

exercises.name: Explosive Push Press
exercises.notes: Bar speed is the instruction. 55kg is the ceiling, not the target. Drop to 50kg if set 1 moves badly.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.notes: Go +7.5kg on set 3 if reps are clean.

exercises.name: Dead Hang
exercises.notes: Max duration each set. Log seconds held.

exercises.name: Incline DB Bench
exercises.notes: 8 to 10 reps. No rest, straight into the row.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported DB Row
exercises.notes: 10 to 12 reps. Rest 90s after the pair.

notes: Session moved from Tue 21 to Wed 22. Grip block: hang only, carry dropped.
